text:
Created attachment 237223
pipe-viewer-0.4.0

Description:

* pet portfmt

ChangeLog: https://github.com/trizen/pipe-viewer/blob/0.4.0/Changes

QA:

* portlint:
  - WARN: Makefile: unless this is a master port, MAINTAINER has to be set by "=", not by "?=".
  - WARN: Makefile: unless this is a master port, COMMENT has to be set by "=", not by "?=".
* testport: OK (poudriere: 13.1-RELEASE, amd64, GTK3 JSON_XS LOCAL_CACHE READLINE SHARE_DIR CHAR_WIDTH LINE_BREAK YOUTUBE_DL YT_DL tested)
